title: Conduct information sessions in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct information sessions in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for information session

pcs.text: Specific purpose and objectives of information session are determined and confirmed1.2 Arrangements are made for session and participants are invited or notified of session in a timely manner1.3 Equipment, tools and other resources required for session are selected and sourced1.4 Information to be communicated in session is planned, structured logically, and organised

elements.title: Present information session

pcs.text: Reason for session and relevance of information being presented are clearly explained to participants2.2 Information is presented clearly using resources and presentation techniques to enhance participant understanding2.3 Session is delivered according to required objectives
